subject: A robed angel descending from above with wings spread wide, holding a vertical staff or blade, light streaming down around her.
description: A pale-robed feminine angel fills the frame, her enormous white-feathered wings spread in full display behind her. She descends from above, head slightly bowed and eyes downcast in serene concentration, holding a long vertical staff or blade in front of her body with both hands. Shafts of warm golden-white light streak down from the top of the composition, illuminating her from behind in a classic heavenly-descent pose. The background is a soft luminous haze of cream and gold with no defined landscape — pure sky and divine light. The overall mood is sublime, devotional, and ceremonial, evoking a blessing or anointing rite delivered from on high.
foreground: robed angel with outspread wings holding a vertical staff
background: luminous sky with descending shafts of golden light
emotion: serene, devotional, eyes downcast in solemn focus
